effect.subject: tok_ibsrela_color_purple
effect.reserved_for: title / first line of the email only

rule_text: No text other than the title/first line may be colored Purple (#92278F). Purple text is reserved exclusively for the title.
intent: Keep Purple exclusive to the opening title line.
summary: Only the title/first line text may be Purple (#92278F); no other text may use Purple color.
